title: Advanced Plating Techniques
description: Learn how to plate dishes beautifully to enhance presentation and dining experience.

steps.instruction: Choose the right plate size and shape for your dish.
Consider color contrast and arrangement of food on the plate.
Use garnishes and sauces to add visual interest and flavor.
Practice different plating styles to find your personal aesthetic.

safety: Ensure all food is prepared and plated in a hygienic manner to prevent foodborne illnesses.
